records.m_Talk_ENG: Why the hesitation? Did you not say you wanted to save your friend?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why the hesitation? Did you not say you wanted to save your friend?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why the hesitation? Did you not say you wanted to save your friend?

records.m_Talk_ENG: For all that bravado, you are rather unimpressive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For all that bravado, you are rather unimpressive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For all that bravado, you are rather unimpressive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up! Do you really think I would back down?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up! Do you really think I would back down?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up! Do you really think I would back down?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? So you had a trick up your sleeve after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? So you had a trick up your sleeve after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? So you had a trick up your sleeve after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dorothy. The Red Shoes have not cooled down enough yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dorothy. The Red Shoes have not cooled down enough yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dorothy. The Red Shoes have not cooled down enough yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Long Strides is still in testing. If you accelerate now, it could overload.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Long Strides is still in testing. If you accelerate now, it could overload.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Long Strides is still in testing. If you accelerate now, it could overload.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then what, you want me to just let Liona be dragged away like that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then what, you want me to just let Liona be dragged away like that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then what, you want me to just let Liona be dragged away like that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Of course not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Of course not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Of course not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will buy you time until your shoes cool down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will buy you time until your shoes cool down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will buy you time until your shoes cool down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Don't tell me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Don't tell me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Don't tell me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like she arrived right on time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like she arrived right on time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like she arrived right on time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Greetings. Nic. Chopper here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Greetings. Nic. Chopper here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Greetings. Nic. Chopper here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Emergency assistance request received via community channels. What kind of support do you require?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Emergency assistance request received via community channels. What kind of support do you require?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Emergency assistance request received via community channels. What kind of support do you require?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heh. Interesting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heh. Interesting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heh. Interesting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you hack this city's defense system?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you hack this city's defense system?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you hack this city's defense system?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is not hacking. It is asking the community.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is not hacking. It is asking the community.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is not hacking. It is asking the community.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I sent a distress request to the two thousand anti-personnel combat drones defending this city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I sent a distress request to the two thousand anti-personnel combat drones defending this city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I sent a distress request to the two thousand anti-personnel combat drones defending this city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even for a Counter, a concentrated barrage of a thousand rounds per minute is going to hurt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even for a Counter, a concentrated barrage of a thousand rounds per minute is going to hurt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even for a Counter, a concentrated barrage of a thousand rounds per minute is going to hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh! You are out of your mind!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh! You are out of your mind!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh! You are out of your mind!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You would even shoot your own friend?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You would even shoot your own friend?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You would even shoot your own friend?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Against a Counter, this much is nothing anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Against a Counter, this much is nothing anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Against a Counter, this much is nothing anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But more importantly, seeing you shield Liona with your own body, it is just as I expected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But more importantly, seeing you shield Liona with your own body, it is just as I expected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But more importantly, seeing you shield Liona with your own body, it is just as I expected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did you say..?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did you say..?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did you say..?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, Dorothy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, Dorothy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, Dorothy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You bastard! Give Liona back...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You bastard! Give Liona back...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You bastard! Give Liona back...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Impressive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Impressive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Impressive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were hiding those fast legs. You almost had me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were hiding those fast legs. You almost had me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were hiding those fast legs. You almost had me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ghk, ugh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ghk, ugh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ghk, ugh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the power of the <color=#ffd34c>forbidden book</color> I possess.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the power of the <color=#ffd34c>forbidden book</color> I possess.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the power of the <color=#ffd34c>forbidden book</color> I possess.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It manipulates the bioelectric currents of living beings, strengthening or paralyzing the nervous system.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It manipulates the bioelectric currents of living beings, strengthening or paralyzing the nervous system.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It manipulates the bioelectric currents of living beings, strengthening or paralyzing the nervous system.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Crawl on the ground like that for a while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Crawl on the ground like that for a while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Crawl on the ground like that for a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not yet. Not yet...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not yet. Not yet...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not yet. Not yet...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, did you forget about me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, did you forget about me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, did you forget about me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That hurt my feelings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That hurt my feelings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That hurt my feelings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that all you have got? I feel just fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that all you have got? I feel just fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that all you have got? I feel just fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Why does the forbidden book have no effect on you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Why does the forbidden book have no effect on you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Why does the forbidden book have no effect on you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. I see now...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. I see now...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. I see now...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are nothing more than a walking vegetable already...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are nothing more than a walking vegetable already...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are nothing more than a walking vegetable already...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. So what about it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. So what about it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. So what about it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a foolish tragedy this is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a foolish tragedy this is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a foolish tragedy this is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did god truly stand by... and refuse to save even such an unfortunate child...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did god truly stand by... and refuse to save even such an unfortunate child...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did god truly stand by... and refuse to save even such an unfortunate child...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that is the case...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that is the case...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that is the case...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then in place of that foolish god, I will deliver you from this tragedy myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then in place of that foolish god, I will deliver you from this tragedy myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then in place of that foolish god, I will deliver you from this tragedy myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, ngh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, ngh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, ngh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: With this, all interference has been eliminated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With this, all interference has been eliminated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With this, all interference has been eliminated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The lamb to be offered has been secured. Now I can finally set foot upon the path of pilgrimage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The lamb to be offered has been secured. Now I can finally set foot upon the path of pilgrimage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The lamb to be offered has been secured. Now I can finally set foot upon the path of pilgrimage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This single step shall become the first step by which all reach Divinity...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This single step shall become the first step by which all reach Divinity...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This single step shall become the first step by which all reach Divinity...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stopping your steps must be the reason the Lord guided us here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stopping your steps must be the reason the Lord guided us here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stopping your steps must be the reason the Lord guided us here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So it is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...So it is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...So it is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, the Holy Curia's dogs have caught your scent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, the Holy Curia's dogs have caught your scent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, the Holy Curia's dogs have caught your scent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It has been a long time, betrayer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It has been a long time, betrayer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It has been a long time, betrayer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you are still drunk on heresy, committing acts this grotesque.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you are still drunk on heresy, committing acts this grotesque.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you are still drunk on heresy, committing acts this grotesque.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Long Legs...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Long Legs...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Long Legs...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you really the Long Legs I used to know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you really the Long Legs I used to know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you really the Long Legs I used to know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cindy. It seems you have received priestly ordination.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cindy. It seems you have received priestly ordination.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cindy. It seems you have received priestly ordination.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It must be thanks to the fine teacher at your side. Should I congratulate you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It must be thanks to the fine teacher at your side. Should I congratulate you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It must be thanks to the fine teacher at your side. Should I congratulate you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it, before I grind that mouth of yours to dust. Answer me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it, before I grind that mouth of yours to dust. Answer me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it, before I grind that mouth of yours to dust. Answer me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are the one who led those idiots and caused this mess in Charade?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are the one who led those idiots and caused this mess in Charade?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are the one who led those idiots and caused this mess in Charade?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what do you plan to do after kidnapping that glasses girl?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what do you plan to do after kidnapping that glasses girl?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what do you plan to do after kidnapping that glasses girl?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What will I do? What an obvious question.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What will I do? What an obvious question.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What will I do? What an obvious question.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This lamb is one of god's vessels that bears the Divinity Fragment, discovered by the Society.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This lamb is one of god's vessels that bears the Divinity Fragment, discovered by the Society.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This lamb is one of god's vessels that bears the Divinity Fragment, discovered by the Society.

records.m_Talk_ENG: God's vessel...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: God's vessel...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: God's vessel...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are not saying...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are not saying...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are not saying...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The same as <color=#ffd34c>that thing</color> we encountered in the demonic realm...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The same as <color=#ffd34c>that thing</color> we encountered in the demonic realm...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The same as <color=#ffd34c>that thing</color> we encountered in the demonic realm...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And by offering this vessel as a sacrifice...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And by offering this vessel as a sacrifice...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And by offering this vessel as a sacrifice...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will rebuild a world where all may finally reach Divinity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will rebuild a world where all may finally reach Divinity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will rebuild a world where all may finally reach Divinity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I would be more than happy to rephrase, betrayer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I would be more than happy to rephrase, betrayer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I would be more than happy to rephrase, betrayer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That will not happen. The Miracle Investigation Council will pass judgment upon you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That will not happen. The Miracle Investigation Council will pass judgment upon you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That will not happen. The Miracle Investigation Council will pass judgment upon you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if we must return our lives to the Lord...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if we must return our lives to the Lord...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if we must return our lives to the Lord...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? Do you think sacrificing such paltry lives can overturn fate?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? Do you think sacrificing such paltry lives can overturn fate?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? Do you think sacrificing such paltry lives can overturn fate?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have no time to waste on mutts who cannot decide anything for themselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have no time to waste on mutts who cannot decide anything for themselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have no time to waste on mutts who cannot decide anything for themselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The fighting dogs suited for a dogfight are already prepared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The fighting dogs suited for a dogfight are already prepared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The fighting dogs suited for a dogfight are already prepared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fighting dogs...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fighting dogs...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fighting dogs...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who're you calling a mutt, you damn priest...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who're you calling a mutt, you damn priest...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who're you calling a mutt, you damn priest...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it weren't for Sis asking, I would've never helped with something like this...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it weren't for Sis asking, I would've never helped with something like this...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it weren't for Sis asking, I would've never helped with something like this...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh. Who are you people...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh. Who are you people...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh. Who are you people...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. You arrived just in time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. You arrived just in time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. You arrived just in time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In that case, I will leave the rest to you. Bygone sisters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In that case, I will leave the rest to you. Bygone sisters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In that case, I will leave the rest to you. Bygone sisters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sisters, my foot! Go die!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sisters, my foot! Go die!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sisters, my foot! Go die!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop right there, Long Legs...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop right there, Long Legs...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop right there, Long Legs...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you really think I would let you run?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you really think I would let you run?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you really think I would let you run?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hurry, Father!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hurry, Father!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hurry, Father!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll handle things here with Junk food.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll handle things here with Junk food.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll handle things here with Junk food.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hemomancy...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hemomancy...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hemomancy...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How is it Goetia, which was lost long ago from the secret library, is here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How is it Goetia, which was lost long ago from the secret library, is here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How is it Goetia, which was lost long ago from the secret library, is here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well then. We sent the damn priest off, and the pay wasn't bad either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well then. We sent the damn priest off, and the pay wasn't bad either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well then. We sent the damn priest off, and the pay wasn't bad either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, we don't really want to be at odds with Holy Curia either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, we don't really want to be at odds with Holy Curia either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, we don't really want to be at odds with Holy Curia either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So how about calling this a draw?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So how about calling this a draw?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So how about calling this a draw?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up, heretic!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up, heretic!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up, heretic!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you have any idea what you have just done?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you have any idea what you have just done?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you have any idea what you have just done?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why waste time talking, Specky Snob? We can just cut them all down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why waste time talking, Specky Snob? We can just cut them all down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why waste time talking, Specky Snob? We can just cut them all down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We don't have time, so come at us already, you half-baked idiots.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We don't have time, so come at us already, you half-baked idiots.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We don't have time, so come at us already, you half-baked idiots.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess that's not going to work. Then it can't be helped...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guess that's not going to work. Then it can't be helped...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess that's not going to work. Then it can't be helped...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We may serve different gods, but don't resent us too much, all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We may serve different gods, but don't resent us too much, all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We may serve different gods, but don't resent us too much, all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Holy Curia lady?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Holy Curia lady?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Holy Curia lady?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Against a Counter, this much is nothing anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Against a Counter, this much is nothing anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Against a Counter, this much is nothing anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But more importantly, seeing you shield Liona with your own body, it is just as I expected.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But more importantly, seeing you shield Liona with your own body, it is just as I expected.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But more importantly, seeing you shield Liona with your own body, it is just as I expected.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What did you say..?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What did you say..?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What did you say..?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, Dorothy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, Dorothy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, Dorothy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You bastard! Give Liona back...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You bastard! Give Liona back...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You bastard! Give Liona back...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Impressive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Impressive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Impressive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were hiding those fast legs. You almost had me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were hiding those fast legs. You almost had me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were hiding those fast legs. You almost had me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ghk, ugh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ghk, ugh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ghk, ugh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the power of the <color=#ffd34c>forbidden book</color> I possess.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the power of the <color=#ffd34c>forbidden book</color> I possess.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the power of the <color=#ffd34c>forbidden book</color> I possess.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It manipulates the bioelectric currents of living beings, strengthening or paralyzing the nervous system.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It manipulates the bioelectric currents of living beings, strengthening or paralyzing the nervous system.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It manipulates the bioelectric currents of living beings, strengthening or paralyzing the nervous system.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Crawl on the ground like that for a while.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Crawl on the ground like that for a while.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Crawl on the ground like that for a while.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not yet. Not yet...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not yet. Not yet...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not yet. Not yet...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, did you forget about me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, did you forget about me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, did you forget about me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That hurt my feelings.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That hurt my feelings.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That hurt my feelings.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that all you have got? I feel just fine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that all you have got? I feel just fine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that all you have got? I feel just fine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? Why does the forbidden book have no effect on you...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? Why does the forbidden book have no effect on you...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? Why does the forbidden book have no effect on you...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. I see now...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. I see now...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. I see now...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are nothing more than a walking vegetable already...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are nothing more than a walking vegetable already...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are nothing more than a walking vegetable already...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. So what about it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. So what about it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. So what about it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What a foolish tragedy this is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: What a foolish tragedy this is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: What a foolish tragedy this is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did god truly stand by... and refuse to save even such an unfortunate child...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did god truly stand by... and refuse to save even such an unfortunate child...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did god truly stand by... and refuse to save even such an unfortunate child...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If that is the case...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If that is the case...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If that is the case...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then in place of that foolish god, I will deliver you from this tragedy myself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then in place of that foolish god, I will deliver you from this tragedy myself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then in place of that foolish god, I will deliver you from this tragedy myself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, ngh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, ngh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, ngh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: With this, all interference has been eliminated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With this, all interference has been eliminated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With this, all interference has been eliminated.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The lamb to be offered has been secured. Now I can finally set foot upon the path of pilgrimage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The lamb to be offered has been secured. Now I can finally set foot upon the path of pilgrimage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The lamb to be offered has been secured. Now I can finally set foot upon the path of pilgrimage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This single step shall become the first step by which all reach Divinity...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This single step shall become the first step by which all reach Divinity...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This single step shall become the first step by which all reach Divinity...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stopping your steps must be the reason the Lord guided us here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stopping your steps must be the reason the Lord guided us here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stopping your steps must be the reason the Lord guided us here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...So it is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...So it is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...So it is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, the Holy Curia's dogs have caught your scent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, the Holy Curia's dogs have caught your scent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, the Holy Curia's dogs have caught your scent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It has been a long time, betrayer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It has been a long time, betrayer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It has been a long time, betrayer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you are still drunk on heresy, committing acts this grotesque.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you are still drunk on heresy, committing acts this grotesque.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you are still drunk on heresy, committing acts this grotesque.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Long Legs...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Long Legs...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Long Legs...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you really the Long Legs I used to know?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you really the Long Legs I used to know?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you really the Long Legs I used to know?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Cindy. It seems you have received priestly ordination.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Cindy. It seems you have received priestly ordination.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Cindy. It seems you have received priestly ordination.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It must be thanks to the fine teacher at your side. Should I congratulate you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It must be thanks to the fine teacher at your side. Should I congratulate you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It must be thanks to the fine teacher at your side. Should I congratulate you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it, before I grind that mouth of yours to dust. Answer me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it, before I grind that mouth of yours to dust. Answer me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it, before I grind that mouth of yours to dust. Answer me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are the one who led those idiots and caused this mess in Charade?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are the one who led those idiots and caused this mess in Charade?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are the one who led those idiots and caused this mess in Charade?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And what do you plan to do after kidnapping that glasses girl?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And what do you plan to do after kidnapping that glasses girl?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And what do you plan to do after kidnapping that glasses girl?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What will I do? What an obvious question.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What will I do? What an obvious question.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What will I do? What an obvious question.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This lamb is one of god's vessels that bears the Divinity Fragment, discovered by the Society.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This lamb is one of god's vessels that bears the Divinity Fragment, discovered by the Society.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This lamb is one of god's vessels that bears the Divinity Fragment, discovered by the Society.

root.m_Talk_ENG: God's vessel...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: God's vessel...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: God's vessel...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are not saying...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are not saying...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are not saying...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The same as <color=#ffd34c>that thing</color> we encountered in the demonic realm...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The same as <color=#ffd34c>that thing</color> we encountered in the demonic realm...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The same as <color=#ffd34c>that thing</color> we encountered in the demonic realm...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And by offering this vessel as a sacrifice...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And by offering this vessel as a sacrifice...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And by offering this vessel as a sacrifice...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will rebuild a world where all may finally reach Divinity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will rebuild a world where all may finally reach Divinity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will rebuild a world where all may finally reach Divinity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I would be more than happy to rephrase, betrayer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I would be more than happy to rephrase, betrayer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I would be more than happy to rephrase, betrayer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That will not happen. The Miracle Investigation Council will pass judgment upon you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That will not happen. The Miracle Investigation Council will pass judgment upon you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That will not happen. The Miracle Investigation Council will pass judgment upon you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if we must return our lives to the Lord...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if we must return our lives to the Lord...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if we must return our lives to the Lord...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Really? Do you think sacrificing such paltry lives can overturn fate?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Really? Do you think sacrificing such paltry lives can overturn fate?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Really? Do you think sacrificing such paltry lives can overturn fate?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have no time to waste on mutts who cannot decide anything for themselves.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have no time to waste on mutts who cannot decide anything for themselves.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have no time to waste on mutts who cannot decide anything for themselves.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The fighting dogs suited for a dogfight are already prepared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The fighting dogs suited for a dogfight are already prepared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The fighting dogs suited for a dogfight are already prepared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fighting dogs...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fighting dogs...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fighting dogs...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who're you calling a mutt, you damn priest...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who're you calling a mutt, you damn priest...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who're you calling a mutt, you damn priest...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it weren't for Sis asking, I would've never helped with something like this...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it weren't for Sis asking, I would've never helped with something like this...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it weren't for Sis asking, I would've never helped with something like this...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh. Who are you people...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh. Who are you people...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh. Who are you people...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. You arrived just in time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. You arrived just in time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. You arrived just in time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In that case, I will leave the rest to you. Bygone sisters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In that case, I will leave the rest to you. Bygone sisters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In that case, I will leave the rest to you. Bygone sisters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sisters, my foot! Go die!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sisters, my foot! Go die!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sisters, my foot! Go die!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stop right there, Long Legs...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stop right there, Long Legs...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stop right there, Long Legs...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you really think I would let you run?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you really think I would let you run?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you really think I would let you run?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hurry, Father!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hurry, Father!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hurry, Father!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll handle things here with Junk food.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll handle things here with Junk food.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll handle things here with Junk food.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hemomancy...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hemomancy...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hemomancy...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How is it Goetia, which was lost long ago from the secret library, is here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How is it Goetia, which was lost long ago from the secret library, is here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How is it Goetia, which was lost long ago from the secret library, is here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well then. We sent the damn priest off, and the pay wasn't bad either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well then. We sent the damn priest off, and the pay wasn't bad either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well then. We sent the damn priest off, and the pay wasn't bad either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, we don't really want to be at odds with Holy Curia either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, we don't really want to be at odds with Holy Curia either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, we don't really want to be at odds with Holy Curia either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So how about calling this a draw?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So how about calling this a draw?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So how about calling this a draw?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up, heretic!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up, heretic!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up, heretic!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you have any idea what you have just done?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you have any idea what you have just done?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you have any idea what you have just done?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why waste time talking, Specky Snob? We can just cut them all down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why waste time talking, Specky Snob? We can just cut them all down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why waste time talking, Specky Snob? We can just cut them all down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We don't have time, so come at us already, you half-baked idiots.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We don't have time, so come at us already, you half-baked idiots.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We don't have time, so come at us already, you half-baked idiots.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Guess that's not going to work. Then it can't be helped...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Guess that's not going to work. Then it can't be helped...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Guess that's not going to work. Then it can't be helped...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We may serve different gods, but don't resent us too much, all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: We may serve different gods, but don't resent us too much, all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: We may serve different gods, but don't resent us too much, all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Holy Curia lady?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Holy Curia lady?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Holy Curia lady?
